<!--
Org-wide default pull request template for withACX. A repository with its own
pull request template overrides this file.
-->

## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences: what this changes and why. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number; use "Closes" / "Fixes" so the issue auto-closes on merge -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to its issue (and milestone, if the project uses them)
- [ ] Tests added or updated, and passing
- [ ] Docs updated (README or relevant docs) if behavior changed
- [ ] American English; no em dashes (A-CX brand)
- [ ] Labels and priority set on the linked issue

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that helps review: risks, trade-offs, areas to scrutinize. Optional. -->
